text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're almost halfway through summer camp, yet
it doesn't seem like Silence Suzuka's managed to
regain her usual vigor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the summer camp scrimmage,
and everyone has high expectations for Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder what her... dream is? What is it... that
makes her run?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (No! I have to focus!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, she fails to meet those expectations.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what's going on with Silence Suzuka.
Ever since we got to summer camp, she hasn't
seemed well.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Really? I hadn't noticed at all... Do you think she's
already peaked?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that night, I find Silence Suzuka standing
alone outside the camp lodgings.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.
choice_data_list: Is there anything I can do to help?
Is there anything I can do to help?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gazes at her feet for a moment before finally
opening her mouth to respond. Her voice is
wavering and hesitant.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Up until recently... the only thing on my mind
when I ran was getting into the lead.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But now... I find myself wondering about the other
racers.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What are their dreams? What is it that motivates
them to run?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All I can think about is...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The things that I've done to them to get here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't know what to do...
choice_data_list: Just focus on running how you always do.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list:
You aren't crushing other people's dreams by
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The expectations of the crowd, their cheers and
applause... They aren't just encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That can't be true...
choice_data_list: At the very least, you inspire me.
At the very least, you inspire me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Still...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The runners who lost could not stop crying.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry, I have to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She returns to the lodge, still dejected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (My body feels like... it's made of lead.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, the clamor of a racecourse can
be heard from the common room.

text_block_list.name: Racing Commentator
text_block_list.text:
"Look at her go! Silence Suzuka simply refuses to
slow down! What speed!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Is that one of my races?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We peek into the common room to find Special
Week with her eyes glued to the TV watching
race footage.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So coool!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Man... I've still got a lot of work to do.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! S-Suzuka! Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, it kind of feels like you just jumped out of
the TV and into real life!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What were you watching?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... To tell you the truth, I've kind of been
in a slump lately.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I'd watch you run to get some
motivation.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I mean, check it out! The race is only half over,
but look at your lead! And it's growing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week points at the television screen.
Displayed is a determined Silence Suzuka leaving
the other runners in the dust.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Why?! After everything... After all the work I've
done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka shuts off the TV without a word.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm sorry. I should've asked you before I put
it on.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, it's okay.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's just... Watching me isn't going to motivate
you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-it totally works! Like, I love this part here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week turns the TV back on frantically
and rewinds the recording.

text_block_list.name: Racing Commentator
text_block_list.text:
"Look at her go! Silence Suzuka simply refuses to
slow down! What speed!"

text_block_list.name: Racing Commentator
text_block_list.text: "She's unstoppable! No one can catch up to her!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I bet I know just how the other racers are
feeling around this point.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They're thinking that no matter how fast they run,
they just can't keep up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: They're thinking about how they've failed again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (So that really is what they think...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But! That's exactly the motivation that starts a
fire in you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's like: "One day, I'll catch up! No matter what!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When I watch you run, it makes me want to do
better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"You aren't crushing other people's dreams by
running."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "You're inspiring people."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Am I really?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: For what?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your admiration.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-wh-what's with that all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's... it's okay if I run, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What? Of course it is! Why? Did something bad
happen?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. No. Nothing at all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry about yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And I wanted to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This morning, I was finally able to understand
what you told me before.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't need to change anything about how I run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka puts her worries behind her and
looks ahead with rekindled determination. It's like
time has been turned back to before summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What should we do today? Maybe some mountain
running?
choice_data_list: Let's do some strength training on the beach!
Let's do a lap around the mountain!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Beach strength training, huh? ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I love looking out at the ocean when I train. This
will be fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been a while since I've seen her smile like this.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A lap around the mountain?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Actually, I feel like I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the first time in months, I see Silence Suzuka
running like her normal self, free and
unrestrained.
